## Description

<!-- What does this script do? -->

## Script location

`powers/<category>/<script-name>/script.js`

## Checklist

- [ ] Script is placed in the correct folder under `powers/`
- [ ] `node script.js --superpowers=describe` runs without errors and outputs valid JSON
- [ ] Descriptor includes `name`, `description`, and `category`
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, secrets, or credentials
- [ ] Script only reads/writes paths provided by the user via `input_schema`
- [ ] Tested run mode locally with real inputs
- [ ] `author` field included in the descriptor
- [ ] Attach a _video demo_ of the script in use (Youtube link fine)
- [ ] Marketplace PNG image. 1200x896
- [ ] Test Instructions: If we can't test it, we can't approve it
